payload.answer: Article ingestion aborted due to unrecoverable 404 error. No durable memory created.

entity_resolution.reason: No conflicting entities exist; event is self-contained.

memory_cards.statement: Failed to fetch article at URL 'https://example.com/missing' due to 404 network error.

details: URL fetch failed with HTTP 404 (Not Found).
No memory cards generated for missing resource.
System preserved failure state for audit.

repair_options: Verify URL correctness and retry fetch.
Check network connectivity or proxy settings.
Confirm article exists at alternate location (if known).
